jobs.title: Customer Success Manager
jobs.content: <p><strong>Customer Success Manager</strong></p><p>Blend is the US-mortgage-origination + consumer-banking digital-platform pioneered around cloud-native-loan-origination & the digital-lending segment.</p>

jobs.title: Sales Engineer - Enterprise
jobs.content: <p>Lead Blend's Sales Engineering function across the Mortgage / Consumer Banking / Title 365 / Builder platform stack.</p>
